THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOTELLE, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BING ELLIOT XIA, DDS, INC. DBA ALLIANCE DENTAL AND ORTHODONTICS NGUYEN, DDS, LISA AKA:  LISA LAM, DDS $690.30 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $805.30, DEFENDANT BING ELLIOT XIA DDS INC. SHALL PAY $690.30 FOR THE COST OF INCOMPLETE TREATMENTS, A REFUND OF THE PRICE PLAINTIFF PAID. NEITHER DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR NEGLIGENCE; THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD HAS EXPIRED. NEITHER DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR DENTAL BATTERY; THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT PLAINTIFF CONSENTED TO THE TREATMENT FOR TOOTH 11. INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LISA NGUYEN IS NOT LIABLE.
